name: scene_nodes_smoke
description: Verify scene_nodes_status reports correctly on an empty doc, scene_nodes_create_graph bootstraps a doc-level Scene Nodes graph via GraphDescription.GetGraph (the modern 2025+ API; the legacy doc.GetNimbusRef path doesn't auto-create in 2026), and scene_nodes_status reflects the new graph via doc_level_graph.present.

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
op = doc.GetFirstObject()
while op:
    nxt = op.GetNext(); op.Remove(); op = nxt
c4d.EventAdd()
print('cleared scene')
